## What this changes

## Type

- [ ] New chain profile
- [ ] New concept page
- [ ] Correction / fix
- [ ] Design / code

## Sources

<!-- List the primary sources for any factual content (whitepaper, spec, official docs). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the structure and tone of existing published pages
- [ ] Content is neutral and sourced — no price/investment content, no hype, no emoji
- [ ] "How It Works" has all three depth levels (Beginner / Intermediate / Builder) — chain profiles
- [ ] Frontmatter matches `site/src/content/config.ts` (correct enum values, valid URL, dated `lastUpdated`)
- [ ] No bare `<` before a number/space in MDX; internal links point to pages that exist
- [ ] New content is submitted with `status: "draft"`
- [ ] `cd site && npm run build` passes locally
